phrases.intent_en: Ask how much the ticket costs to walk on the bridge
phrases.text_local: Combien coûte le billet pour le pont ?
phrases.pronunciation: kom-BYAN koot luh bee-YAY poor luh PON
phrases.cultural_note: Walking on the Pont d'Avignon requires a ticket. A combined ticket with the Palais des Papes is available.

responses.english: Five euros. There's a combined ticket with the Palais des Papes.
responses.phonetic: sank uh-ROH. eel ee ah uhn bee-YAY kohm-bee-NAY ah-VEK luh pah-LAY day PAH-puh
responses.french: Cinq euros. Il y a un billet combiné avec le Palais des Papes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an audio guide for the bridge
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un audioguide pour la visite ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn oh-dee-oh-GEED poor lah vee-ZEET
phrases.cultural_note: An audio guide is available and included with the entry ticket. It explains the bridge's history in several languages.

responses.english: Yes, it's included in the ticket. Ask for it at the counter.
responses.phonetic: wee, say ahn-KLOO dahn luh bee-YAY. duh-mahn-DAY luh oh gee-SHAY
responses.french: Oui, c'est inclus dans le billet. Demandez-le au guichet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if you can walk on the bridge
phrases.cultural_note: Yes! You can walk on the 4 remaining arches. There's a small chapel (Saint-Nicolas) on the bridge.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the opening hours of the bridge
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ouvre le pont ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel uhr OOV-ruh luh PON
phrases.cultural_note: The bridge site has regular opening hours that vary by season. It closes earlier in winter.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance. It depends on the season.
responses.phonetic: layz oh-REHR son ah-fee-SHAY ah lahn-TRAY. sah day-PAHN duh lah say-ZON
responses.french: Les horaires sont affichés à l'entrée. Ça dépend de la saison.
